description: Omda AS provides software solutions for the healthcare and emergency response sector in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, and internationally. The company offers laboratory information management systems consisting of Omda ProSang, a blood, cell, and tissue management system; and medical medication solution comprising Omda Cytodose, an oncology medication management solution. It also provides connected healthcare solutions, including Omda Cardio, an ECG and diagnostic storage tool; Omda CIMA, a clinical imaging mobile application; Omda Media, a web-based medical imaging solution; Omda Medimaker, an image management and workflow solution; Omda Picsara, an image management solution; Omda Arcidis, an integrated teleradiology system; Omda Helsemail, an patient data transfer tool; Omda Plutus, an audit and workflow monitoring platform; Omda S7, a secure e-care communications platform; and Omda XDS, a patient data storage and management solution. In addition, the company offers Omda Fertsoft, a data solution for advanced assisted reproductive technology clinics; Omda iPana Hospital, a digital maternity solution; Omda iPana Maternity, a cloud-based platform for women maternity care; and Omda Partus, a data solution for the maternity sector, as well as health analytics products comprising Omda Compos, a medical data management solution; and Omda MedSciNet for collection, analysis, and management of medical data. Further, it provides Omda Optima that enables emergency organizations to test resource distribution and operational strategy through digital simulations; Omda CoordCom, an integrated emergency response platform; Omda AMIS, a digital platform for processing emergency calls and coordinating various aspects of the medical response; and Omda Paratus, an emergency response system. The company was formerly known as CSAM Health Group AS and changed its name to Omda AS in September 2023. Omda AS was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
